rationale: CMAP beforeHandshake flag incorrectly flipped for timeout errors; specific spec rule about error classification violated.
Driver rejects arbitrary explain levels; DRIVERS-1306 says they should be allowed; driver deviates from spec requirement.
Exception propagation failure in async cursor.forEach; Node.js async callback plumbing bug, not a spec rule violation.
Command monitoring spec requires redacting auth-related commands; driver erroneously published auth data in events (CVE-2021-32050).
TypeScript type improvement for cursor project() return type; ergonomics/typings, not a spec rule violation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1633; backporting 'hello' command usage when API version declared, child of cross-driver coordination ticket.
Command monitoring events expose internal state references; spec requires emitting copies, not references to internal command objects.
BSON ObjectId serialization fails between Node.js and browser dist variants due to buffer instance-checking; packaging/bundling issue.
PCRE-style regex handling in BSON; spec doesn't mandate support for non-JS regex formats; implementation gap not contradicting a specific rule.
TypeScript type improvements for UpdateFilter operators; typing ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Retryable writes check against topology instead of server type; retryable writes spec requires per-server check, driver fails on single-host sharded clusters.
Bug in unified test runner's handling of $$unsetOrMatches for embedded documents; test infrastructure fix, not driver behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1649; syncing tests for 'acceptApiVersion2' rename; test infrastructure update.
Better error message for unsupported authMechanism; UX/error messaging improvement, not a spec rule violation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1793; bumping maxWireVersion for MongoDB 5.0; version compatibility update, not a spec nonconformance.
EJSON spec says non-finite doubles use $numberDouble in relaxed mode; driver serializes them as null instead.
Documentation ticket for Versioned API connection examples; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1771; CI testing against 5.0 servers; test infrastructure/CI, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1490; sync spec tests for AWS temporary credentials in CSFLE; test infrastructure update.
SRV URLs ignore tls= option; connection string spec requires honoring explicit tls option; driver unconditionally sets tls=true.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1774/1438/1779; time-series collection support; child of cross-driver coordination tickets for spec rollout.
Prevent concurrent emitter and iterator usage on change streams; API safety guard, no specific spec rule mandates this error.
TypeScript typings improvement for ListCollections cursor response; typing ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1750; pull in spec tests for 'hello' command monitoring support; test infrastructure sync.
TypeScript function override definitions for db.watch() and client.watch(); typing ergonomics bug, not spec-related.
Bulk operations ignore session transactions; transactions spec requires session to be passed through all operations including bulk.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1819; pull in spec tests for disabling writes on snapshot sessions; test infrastructure sync.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1820; pull in unified tests for snapshot sessions error on pre-5.0 servers; test infrastructure sync.
Deployment failure on Azure Functions due to require_optional vs optional_require rename; packaging/dependency issue.
Updating maintainer email address and package.json metadata; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Kerberos CI test failure on Windows Appveyor; CI/build infrastructure issue, not spec conformance.
Issue split from DRIVERS-776; pull in spec test changes for aggregate $out with let option; test infrastructure sync.
Webpack build failure due to optional mongodb-client-encryption dependency; packaging/bundling issue, no spec involvement.
Vite build failure due to BSON dependency; build tooling/bundling issue, no spec conformance involvement.
TypeScript typings missing expireAfterSeconds in createIndexes; typing ergonomics bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1506; pull in spec tests for change stream delta oplog entries; test infrastructure sync.
TypeScript AsyncIterator symbol typing error on cursor; typing ergonomics bug, not spec-related.
Internal refactor to consolidate optional dependencies into deps.js; no behavior change, no spec involvement.
Driver parses SERVICE_REALM authMechanismProperties but doesn't use it in Kerberos; auth spec requires honoring this property.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1173; driver handling of DBRefs per spec; child of cross-driver coordination ticket.
Memory leak of JSArrayBufferData from BSON usage; performance/resource leak, no specific spec rule contradicted.
TypeScript compilation failure with tsc after v4 upgrade; typing/compilation issue, not spec conformance.
Internal refactor of AggregationOperation to remove unnecessary parent parameter; no behavior change, no spec involvement.
Accepting both null and undefined for optional parameters; TypeScript strictness fix, not a spec conformance issue.
Timestamp() constructor argument order differs between legacy shell and driver; API design issue, no BSON spec rule governs constructor argument ordering.
TypeScript | void in Collection.rename() overload declaration; typing bug, not spec-related.
Command monitoring inadvertently enabled by default in v4; unintentional default change causing perf regression, not a spec rule violation.
Sessions spec defines advanceClusterTime method; driver missing this required method per spec.
TypeScript readonly arrays not accepted by driver functions; typing ergonomics issue, not a spec conformance problem.
TypeScript Projection<T> type too narrow; typing ergonomics issue, no spec rule governs driver TypeScript type definitions.
